name: Execution Governance

timeline.summary: Bound B-083, B-084, and B-085 to release-0-1-11. Updated technical-plans/INDEX.md, B-083 workstream_children, and the B-084 parent plan Must-Ship state. Ran mutating selective sync and compass refresh so the release-target view shows all three Claude workstreams in the active 0.1.11 set. 44 runtime tests passed (test_host_runtime_contract, test_agent_runtime_contract, test_execution_governance, test_claude_host_statusline, test_claude_host_precompact_snapshot, test_claude_project_hooks).

B-084/CB-103 in-flight: flip Claude supports_explicit_model_selection to True, restructure execution profile ladder with (host_family, profile) axis so Claude resolves to haiku/sonnet/opus while Codex tuples stay byte-identical, differentiate 8 .claude/agents/ models, and co-land the flag flip with the ladder column in one commit per CB-103 invariant.

what_it_is: Constraint-aware execution runtime that materializes task contracts, admissibility decisions, frontiers, closure, receipts, contradiction records, and host-aware execution hints before Odylith acts.
why_tracked: Owns the boundary that turns grounding into governed next-action control instead of soft prompt advice.
